objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

current.milestone_title: Document rolling stop-condition behavior for Codex App runs
current.slice_title: Validate the new stop-condition verifiers and repo/docs wiring
acceptance_criteria: Campfire includes deterministic budget-limit and waiting-on-decision rolling verifiers
The repo verification suite runs both new stop-condition verifiers
README and task-state docs explain that rolling pauses preserve the active milestone and queued backlog

execution.notes: The stop-condition backlog was consumed in this run. Frame the next rolling backlog before the next unattended Codex App session.

last_run.summary: Added rolling budget-limit and waiting-on-decision verifiers, wired them into repo verification, and documented how rolling pauses preserve the active milestone and queued backlog.
last_run.next_step: Choose the next Campfire improvement milestone and frame a new rolling backlog before the next unattended run.

validation.summary: Framed the next rolling backlog around stop conditions other than success.
Repo verification passed after the stop-condition verifier and docs updates.
Evaluation note confirms the stop-condition backlog is complete.
